sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Hello, World!'), (2, 'Data Science');
SELECT id, translate(name, 'elo', 'ELO') AS modified_name FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET name = translate(name, 'a', 'A') WHERE id = 2;
SELECT translate(name, 'S', 's'), id FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
